title: NEO 4.0 P4-AUTONOMY run-level manifest (persisted run identity + D-CAP breaker caps)
_home: <RunRoot>/run_manifest.json (per autonomous run; written ONCE at run start; resume READS it, never rewrites)
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P4-C1C3-S1. Spec 0F4C8B81 section 4 C3 (D-CAP recorded 2026-07-05): caps are REQUIRED config - never no-cap-by-default; started_at_utc is the PERSISTED wall-clock origin (crash-safe, not process uptime). STRICT POSITIVITY (> 0) of each cap is enforced fail-closed by the supervisor (Assert-NeoRunCapsValid, reason CAPS_INVALID); the schema floor is minimum 0 because exclusiveMinimum is outside the installed validator's fail-closed keyword set.
